Picture Of the day¶

picture_of_the_day(self, date=None, hd=False, count=None)¶

Returns data for the NASA APOD (Astronomy Picture of the Day).

Parameters

  • date (str, datetime.datetime or None) – If specified data for the APOD corresponding to that date will be returned. If None todays APOD will be returned.

  • hd (bool) – If True the High Definition Image URL is returned.

  • count (int or None) – If specified <count> random images will be returned. (Cant be used with date.)

Raises

  • TypeError – Raised if the parameter <hd> is not boolean.

  • HTTPError – Raised if response fails. (When Status code is not 200)

Returns

Dictionary object containing JSON data returned from the API.

Return type

dict
